name: browser-control-daemon
description: Local daemon bridging AI agents with Chrome browser automation. Provides HTTP + WebSocket API for browser control.

scripts.typecheck: node --check daemon.js && node --check browser-control.js && node --check browser-control-mcp.mjs && node --check protocol.js && node --check support.js && node --check health-check.js && node --check open-chrome.js && node --check screenshot.js && node --check session-cleanup.js
